description: Court record, drawn up in Fustat, recording a gift. Given by: Sitt al-Bayt bt. Hillel ha-Zaqen, the widow of R. Ḥiyya ha-Mumḥe b. Ẓedaqa ha-Mumḥe. Given to: Abū l-Ḥasan b. ʿEli ha-Zaqen b. Yefet ha-Zaqen known as Ḥasān. This is the second entry on the page; the first seems to be an eschatological text. There is also a letter fragment on verso (PGPID 3117).
